chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 299 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos. 1, 26 & 28. 2. For orders on CMA No. 1236/2020. (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 1237/2020. (stay) 16.01.2026. Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for applicant. Prima facie this is a time barred reference. Be that as it may, this matter is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today, learned counsel seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
